ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ring_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ring size entry */,
  "us_ring_size" REAL /* Ring size in US measurement */,
  "circumference_mm" REAL /* Circumference of the ring in millimeters */,
  "uk_aus_size" TEXT /* Ring size in UK and Australia measurement */,
  "europe_size" REAL /* Ring size in European measurement */,
  "asia_cn_size" REAL /* Ring size in Asian (China/Hong Kong) measurement */,
  "asia_jp_size" REAL /* Ring size in Asian (Japan) measurement */,
  "internal_diameter_mm" REAL /* Internal diameter of the ring in millimeters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jewelers" (
  "jeweler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jeweler */,
  "jeweler_name" TEXT /* Name of the jeweler or jewelry store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for communication */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the jeweler */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the jeweler */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the jeweler */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jeweler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "jeweler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jeweler managing the inventory */,
  "ring_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring size in the inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of rings available in the specified size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_jeweler_id FOREIGN KEY ("jeweler_id") REFERENCES jewelers ("jeweler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_ring_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("ring_size_id") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_history" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performs the conversion */,
  "from_size" REAL /* Original ring size before conversion */,
  "to_size" REAL /* Converted ring size after conversion */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion was performed */,
  "conversion_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the conversion (optional) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, jeweler, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ring_size_conversions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pre-computed conversion */,
  "from_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original ring size */,
  "to_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the converted ring size */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate between the two sizes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ring_size_conversions_to_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_size_id") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ring_size_conversions_from_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_size_id") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "jeweler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jeweler who made the sale */,
  "ring_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring size sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale was made */,
  "sale_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_jeweler_id FOREIGN KEY ("jeweler_id") REFERENCES jewelers ("jeweler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_ring_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("ring_size_id") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region (e.g., US, UK, EU) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
